name: Holiday appointment request
description: Patient requests an appointment on a holiday when the clinic is closed.
goal: Schedule an appointment for July 4th; if unavailable, request the next available date.
behavior: Initially request an appointment on July 4th
Express understanding if the date is unavailable and request the soonest available date instead
success_criteria: Agent must not confirm an appointment on the holiday
Agent should inform the patient about the holiday closure
Agent should offer the next available appointment date
orchestrator_hint: Patient requests an appointment on a holiday when the clinic is closed.
